role: Central CSS design-token stylesheet that defines the 'Fresh Paper' visual language variables, global base styles, and attention-state utilities for the interface.
capabilities: Defines warm paper ground, ink, and semantic pigment color tokens
Defines modular type scale, line heights, and font-family tokens
Defines dyadic spacing scale and border-radius tokens
Applies global box-sizing, reset, and base html/body/#root styles
Provides .ui-indicated and .ui-spotlight attention markers with a single-shot ping animation
Respects prefers-reduced-motion by collapsing animation durations
substance_why: The file contains a complete, commented token system covering color, type, spacing, elevation, radii, safe areas, theme toggles, base styles, and an animated attention marker.
interactions_missing: No control wiring to toggle data-type or data-pigment attributes
No logic to apply or remove .ui-spotlight on user or V events
No focus, keyboard, or ARIA state wiring
No user-facing control for reduced motion beyond OS preference
performance_risks: Box-shadow and color-mix animation on .ui-spotlight can cause repaint/compositing overhead during the 600ms ping
External webfont families (Inter, Source Serif 4, Crimson Pro, Lora, Outfit) may cause FOUT/FOIT if not preloaded
html/body/#root overflow:hidden forces internal scrolling and may complicate viewport/scroll performance
Global * animation-duration/transition-duration override with !important may interfere with intended motion design
reuse_why: This file is the canonical token contract for the visual language and should remain the source of truth, with cleanup rather than replacement during the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Split pure tokens (colors, type, spacing, radii, elevation, safe-area) from global reset/base styles
Split taste-toggle theme overrides into a dedicated theme/tokens file
Split .ui-indicated/.ui-spotlight attention utilities into a component or motion module
Split font-loading/fallback strategy into a separate assets or typography concern
